title: cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. gaditana
intro: Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. gaditana, also known as Venus' pride, is a succulent plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. gaditana include its potential to treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
